svg.title: Vee Group Diagnostic Tool — Full Architecture
svg.desc: Three-part architecture: inductive diagnostic methodology, multi-agent pipeline, and technical deployment on Google Cloud Run.
svg.text: VEE GROUP DIAGNOSTIC SYSTEM — FULL ARCHITECTURE
PART 1 — INTELLECTUAL FOUNDATION: INDUCTIVE DIAGNOSTIC METHODOLOGY
Vee Group approach (inductive) — start from what's real, classify upward
What is actually working in this business right now, measured in outcomes?
Revenue source · customer retention · referral rate · team stability · margin · cash position
What decisions and behaviours are producing those outcomes?
What does this business do routinely that competitors don't? What emerged without anyone designing it?
does this behaviour match a known pattern?
For each strength: can it survive 3× growth? Is it person-dependent or system-dependent?
What is the explicit "do not touch" list? What strength, if doubled down on, produces disproportionate results?
Where is the asymmetric amplification opportunity?
Patterns enter only at Layer 3 — as a classification lens, not a starting point
Searches 1,982 failure cases · sector keyword scoring · returns top 120–180 ranked matches
Runs contrast framework · scores severity 0–100 · selects Ghost Match · maps risk dimensions
Maps all findings to Vee services · builds personalised intervention plan · ranks priorities
Client diagnostic report · Vee expert brief · survival probability · Day 1–7 execution plan
GOOGLE CLOUD RUN — SERVERLESS AUTO-SCALING CONTAINER
Consent gate · 5,000 char cap · error handling
No submission data stored by Vee Group · API call only · GDPR / DPDP / UK GDPR / CCPA compliant · Consent required before every call
© 2026 Vee Group · New Delhi & United Kingdom · veegroup.in
